content.text:
All 3 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added a simple conditional that returns `{ premium: 71 }` when the first item is an amulet, otherwise falls through to the existing `{ premium: 115 }` for swords.
- Result: All tests now pass (3 passing, 32 todo).
- Approach: This is minimal - just a single conditional check on the item type, using a hardcoded return value for the amulet case. No generalization, no formula computation, no over-implementation. Future tests (staff, potion, rune, moonstone) will force generalization at the appropriate time.
